PELAN ANTIRASUAH JPKN 2024 Tarikh: 2024-03-01 Maklumat yang terkandung dalam pelan ini adalah khusus untuk kegunaan Jabatan Perkhidmatan Komputer Negeri (JPKN) Sabah dan tertakluk kepada perubahan tanpa sebarang notis. JPKN tidak akan bertanggungjawab atas sebarang kesilapan akibat penggunaan maklumat yang terkandung di dalamnya. Klik untuk lihat butiran Jabatan Perkhidmatan Komputer Negeri Jabatan Perkhidmatan Komputer Negeri Tingkat 6 & 7, Blok A Menara Kinabalu Jalan UMS,Teluk Likas 88400 Kota Kinabalu SABAH No Tel/faks: +6088 – 368900+6088 – 215 116+6088 – 368 833 (Helpdesk) email: jpkn@sabah.gov.my Pautan Webmail Sabah Gov Sistem i-Adu (Unit Integriti Negeri Sabah) Kelab Sukan dan Rekreasi Komputer (KESITAR) PAKSi Sabah E-Circular WAKTU PEJABAT Hari Bekerja: Isnin – JumaatMasa Bekerja: 7:30 am – 17:00 pmWaktu Rehat: 13:00 – 14:00Cuti: Sabtu , Ahad, dan Cuti Umum. Sijil Dan Pengikhtirafan “SABAH MAJU JAYA” JABATAN PERKHIDMATAN KOMPUTER NEGERI // Import Firebase Modules import {

7:30 am – 17:00 pmWaktu Rehat: 13:00 – 14:00Cuti: Sabtu , Ahad, dan Cuti Umum. Sijil Dan Pengikhtirafan “SABAH MAJU JAYA” JABATAN PERKHIDMATAN KOMPUTER NEGERI // Import Firebase Modules import { initializeApp } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/11.4.0/firebase-app.js"; import { getFirestore, doc, getDoc, setDoc, runTransaction, serverTimestamp, onSnapshot } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/11.4.0/firebase-firestore.js"; // Firebase configuration const firebaseConfig = { apiKey: "AIzaSyAqpGN30mhbzGfy7oaNcpb0WNcWjgUUHhc", authDomain: "jpkn-website-visitors.firebaseapp.com", projectId: "jpkn-website-visitors", storageBucket: "jpkn-website-visitors.appspot.com", messagingSenderId: "765896329853", appId: "1:765896329853:web:5188de7834186d13d37f14" }; // Initialize Firebase const app = initializeApp(firebaseConfig); const db = getFirestore(app); // Function to calculate current date in MYT (Malaysia Time) function getMalaysiaDateString() { const now = new Date(); const

const app = initializeApp(firebaseConfig); const db = getFirestore(app); // Function to calculate current date in MYT (Malaysia Time) function getMalaysiaDateString() { const now = new Date(); const malaysiaTime = new Date(now.getTime() + (8 * 60 * 60 * 1000)); return malaysiaTime.toISOString().split("T")[0]; } // Function to reset visitor stats /* async function resetAllVisitorStats() { const docRef = doc(db, "stats", "visitors"); const resetData = { todayVisitors: 0, totalVisitors: 0, totalHits: 0, lastUpdated: new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0] }; try { await setDoc(docRef, resetData); console.log("Visitor stats reset successfully."); } catch (error) { console.error("Error resetting visitor stats:", error); } } */ // Function to update visitor stats async function updateVisitorStats() { const docRef = doc(db, "stats", "visitors"); try { await runTransaction(db, async (transaction) => { const docSnap = await transaction.get(docRef); let data = docSnap.exists() ? docSnap.data() :

{ const docRef = doc(db, "stats", "visitors"); try { await runTransaction(db, async (transaction) => { const docSnap = await transaction.get(docRef); let data = docSnap.exists() ? docSnap.data() : { todayVisitors: 0, totalVisitors: 0, totalHits: 0, lastUpdated: getMalaysiaDateString() }; const today = getMalaysiaDateString(); // Reset daily counter if date has changed if (data.lastUpdated !== today) { data.todayVisitors = 0; data.lastUpdated = today; } // Count today's uniue visitor (once per day per browser) const visitedToday = localStorage.getItem("visitedToday"); if (visitedToday !== today) { data.todayVisitors++; localStorage.setItem("visitedToday", today); } // Check if the user is a unique visitor (across multiple days) const uniqueVisitorKey = `uniqueVisitor-${today}`; if (!localStorage.getItem(uniqueVisitorKey)) { data.totalVisitors++; localStorage.setItem(uniqueVisitorKey, "true"); } data.totalHits++; // Update Firestore transaction.set(docRef, data); }); } catch (error) {

{ data.totalVisitors++; localStorage.setItem(uniqueVisitorKey, "true"); } data.totalHits++; // Update Firestore transaction.set(docRef, data); }); } catch (error) { console.error("Error updating visitor stats:", error); } } // Function to format the date and time function formatDateTime(date) { let day = date.getDate().toString().padStart(2, '0'); let month = (date.getMonth() + 1).toString().padStart(2, '0'); let year = date.getFullYear(); let hours = date.getHours().toString().padStart(2, '0'); let minutes = date.getMinutes().toString().padStart(2, '0'); let seconds = date.getSeconds().toString().padStart(2, '0'); return `${day}/${month}/${year} ${hours}:${minutes}:${seconds}`; } // Function to update last updated time in Firestore async function updateLastUpdatedTime() { const docRef = doc(db, "stats", "lastUpdated"); const newTime = new Date(); try { await setDoc(docRef, { timestamp: serverTimestamp() }, { merge: true }); document.getElementById("last-updated-time").textContent =

doc(db, "stats", "lastUpdated"); const newTime = new Date(); try { await setDoc(docRef, { timestamp: serverTimestamp() }, { merge: true }); document.getElementById("last-updated-time").textContent = formatDateTime(newTime); } catch (error) { console.error("Error updating last updated time:", error); } } // Function to fetch the last updated time from Firestore async function fetchLastUpdatedTime() { const docRef = doc(db, "stats", "lastUpdated"); try { const docSnap = await getDoc(docRef); if (docSnap.exists()) { const data = docSnap.data(); if (data.timestamp) { document.getElementById("last-updated-time").textContent = formatDateTime(data.timestamp.toDate()); } } } catch (error) { console.error("Error fetching last updated time:", error); } } // Real-time listener for visitor stats onSnapshot(doc(db, "stats", "visitors"), (docSnap) => { if (docSnap.exists()) { let data = docSnap.data(); document.getElementById("today-visitors").textContent = data.todayVisitors;

visitor stats onSnapshot(doc(db, "stats", "visitors"), (docSnap) => { if (docSnap.exists()) { let data = docSnap.data(); document.getElementById("today-visitors").textContent = data.todayVisitors; document.getElementById("total-visitors").textContent = data.totalVisitors; document.getElementById("total-hits").textContent = data.totalHits; } }); // Real-time listener for last updated time onSnapshot(doc(db, "stats", "lastUpdated"), (docSnap) => { if (docSnap.exists()) { const data = docSnap.data(); if (data.timestamp) { document.getElementById("last-updated-time").textContent = formatDateTime(data.timestamp.toDate()); } } }); // Run functions on page load document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => { // resetAllVisitorStats(); // Only use this when user want to reset the Pelawat Hari Ini/Jumlah Pelawat/Jumlah Capaian updateVisitorStats(); fetchLastUpdatedTime(); updateLastUpdatedTime(); }); Pelawat Hari Ini: 26 Jumlah Pelawat: 7693 Jumlah Capaian: 16643 Last updated: 15/07/2025
